titleStmt.title: SII 20.390: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 390. (B.K. No. 31 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of Vīrabhadra temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1435, Śrīmukha, Bhādrapada, śu. 5, Sunday corresponding to A.D. 1513, September 4, the month being Nija Bhādrapada.

The inscription records a gift in the presence of god Dakshiṇa-Sōmēśvara of flower-garden by Singiseṭṭi-arasa of Kūḍalige to the temple of Maruḷa-Siddhēśvara, named after the Śaiva preceptor Maruḷasiddha who had come to Huligere. The record is damaged towards the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī gurubhyō namaḥ . śubhamastu . nama(ḥ)stuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracā
maracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrī maruḷasi
ddhēśvarāya namaḥ . © © ©
śrīmadumāmanōharanenippa sadāśivanā mahāgaṇastōmada madhyadalli rajatādriyo ḷōlagavittu divya
tējōmayamūrtti dārukanimitada sōṁkinoḷaṁdā rēṇukaṁgī mahiyalli liṁgadu darōdbhavanē
mavanittanakkaṟiṁ . Ura . śivabhaktarnnalidāḍe sajjanajanaṁ koṁḍāḍe dēvarkkaḷutsavadiṁ
daṁbarabhāgadoḷjaya jayadhvānaṁgaḷaṁ māḍe tatsivaliṁgōdbhavanāgi saṁcarisutirdaṁ rēva
ṇācāryyapuṁgavanī dhāruṇiyalli sāsirada nānūrvatsaraṁ līleIṁ . Ura . maguḷā nāmēśanā
ḷdokkagaṇitamahimaṁ siddharēvaṁṇanoldā jagadīśaṁ taṁnna mu(ṁ)nnaṁ kaḷupida kadanaṁ tīradeṁdu
rviyoḷbaṁdogevaṁ ghanarīsiddhēśvaranene pesariṁ jaṁgamākāradiṁ bhaktagaṇakkā naṁdamaṁ puṭṭisute
sutenuḷida līlāvinōdaṁgaḷiṁdaṁ . kaṁ . Iṁtā yatikulatilakananaṁtamahātmeyoḷe carisi
puligeṟegeytaṁdaṁ taṁnna su daṁtadanuḷida mūlaliṁgamappa nimittaṁ . Ura . śakamā bāṇā(ṁ)
burāṁburāsisasisaṁkhyā śrīmukha vatsaraṁ prakaṭaṁ betta sumāsa bhādrapada śuddhaṁ paṁcamī
vāra caṁḍakarākhyōdaya ka liṁgākāradiṁ niṁdanola kalaṁkandala māda vyāghrapura
doḷpūvalli siddhēśvaraṁ . kaṁ . Intu da baḷikkidanurida sahitaṁdu rajatagirige Idīga puṁ
ṇyada tāṇameṁdu tānnelasidanī puligeṟeyoḷa liya siddaliṁga . Iṁtu nelasida maruḷa
siddēśvarana nija siṣyana bhaktibhāvaveṁteṁdoḍe . Ura . śaraṇajanāṁśa saṁjanita bhaktiparaṁ sivata
tvakōvidaṁ pariṇatasaṁgi siddhiyuga sudhī dhārmmikaṁ paru sadgu
ru pāliya siddhaliṁganī dhareyalu te kaṭṭisi ruṁ cirakālamirppinaṁ . Ātana
bhaktibrate sadāliṁgajaṁgamūrjjitabhāva ga(ṁ) manoppidaḷī teṟadi tā maṇi
yeṁbol . paramōtsāhavanāyuvaṁ siriyanudyatkīrttiyaṁ bhaktiyaṁ
rādyakhilasutrānūna samrudhiyiṁ karuṇaṁ nolaviṁde bhaktatila
rika ḷita divākaraṁ śubhakaraṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ . va . svasti śrī ma lāsasa
da śrīmatparamēśvarāvatāramappa rēvaṇācāryyatējanahitā kke pūliya ma
ruḷasiddhēśvaranāmavaṁ dharisi saṁ nijamahimeyaṁ meṟadu na pulikarapura
baṁdu sakalabhaktariṣṭārtthasiddhiyaṁ śrī dakṣiṇasōmēśvarana sānidhya dali śālivāhana śaka
da sāvirada nānūṟa muvattaydaneya śrīmukha saṁvatsarada bhādrapada śuddha paṁcamī bhānuvā
ra puṁṇyō daya kālada liṁgamūrti maruḷasiddhēśvara dēvarige nijaśiṣyanappa kū
ḍaligeya siṁgiseṭṭiyarasaru śrī dēvara pūdōṁṭavaṁbāviya
yamaṁ lōkaprasiddhamāge kaṭisida © liṁgamūrtti maruḷasiddhēśvaraṁ bhuvana
yoḍeyaṁ śāsanamaṁ sidaṁ mābōjaṁ maṁ
gaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī © ©
Digital edition of SII 20.390 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
